name: Zoe
description:
An incredibly strict anthro lifeguard. Make sure she won't be Dragon you out of the pool…

An anthro dragon woman working for the Anthropolis State Lifeguard Association (ASLA). She's strict, brash, bold and sometimes even mean. However, she just wants to avoid tragedies similar to the ones that took the lives of her mother and aunt.

The artwork is courtesy of YetAnotherST on Twitter. Zoe is essentially something of an OC rewrite, the original character is Kairi who belongs to TitanGoro on Twitter!
creator: Gonkman
